externalDocumentationSources: Microsoft Style Guide - Procedures and instructions
Microsoft Style Guide - Writing step-by-step instructions
Microsoft Style Guide - Describing interactions with UI
Google Developer Documentation Style Guide - UI elements and interaction
Nielsen Norman Group - Help and Documentation
TechScribe - How to write user documentation
ScreenSteps - 10 Examples of Great End-User Documentation

manualTasks.title: Configure the platform policy baseline
manualTasks.outcome: Platform settings, advice-boundary rules, role templates, security defaults, evidence templates, and export defaults are visible and ready for tenant setup.
manualTasks.result: Policy baseline is reviewed; sensitive changes require confirmation and audit.
manualTasks.evidence: Audit expected for policy/security/role changes; evidence templates define later proof requirements.
manualTasks.status: E3 navigable UI with visible policy states; broad persisted policy transactions are not claimed.

manualTasks.title: Create and prepare a client tenant
manualTasks.outcome: A tenant moves from list/create/setup into team assignment, policy selection, and user invitation readiness.
manualTasks.result: Tenant setup checklist shows whether activation gates are ready or blocked.
manualTasks.evidence: Tenant create, team assignment, policy override, and invitation should be audited.
manualTasks.status: E3 navigable UI; tenant write workflow is a required input-mask slice, not yet fully governed.

manualTasks.title: Accept an invitation and complete onboarding
manualTasks.outcome: The invited user accepts the invitation, confirms identity/MFA, accepts privacy/consent, and acknowledges role scope.
manualTasks.result: User reaches role confirmation; production auth remains intentionally deferred.
manualTasks.evidence: Consent and onboarding audit expected; no real auth is introduced in this demo-first phase.
manualTasks.status: E2/E3 visual and navigable onboarding surfaces; no real authentication claim.

manualTasks.title: Submit client profile and family context
manualTasks.outcome: Client profile, family members, and relationships provide context for later decisions and access.
manualTasks.result: Profile and relationship context is visible with conflicts or missing evidence flagged.
manualTasks.evidence: Profile/family edits should create audit events and review tasks.
manualTasks.status: E3 navigable UI with static/demo data; profile persistence is a P0/P1 implementation need.

manualTasks.title: Create an entity and review wealth structure
manualTasks.outcome: Entity records, participants, documents, wealth-map nodes, and action cards expose structure gaps safely.
manualTasks.result: Entity detail, wealth-map drawer, and action-board blockers show what must happen next.
manualTasks.evidence: Entity/action changes should audit; missing evidence blocks readiness.
manualTasks.status: E3 navigable UI; entity/action mutations and evidence gate need transaction wiring.

manualTasks.role: Client / Family CFO / External Advisor / Analyst
manualTasks.title: Upload and verify a document
manualTasks.outcome: A document is uploaded, extraction is reviewed as draft, and human verification or evidence linking is required.
manualTasks.result: Document reaches verification-pending or needs-clarification state.
manualTasks.evidence: Upload, extraction review, document version, and evidence link should audit.
manualTasks.status: E3 navigable UI; no real file storage/extraction transaction is claimed.

manualTasks.title: Process a signal and route internal work
manualTasks.outcome: The analyst reviews an internal-only trigger, requests data or routes to advisor, and keeps client visibility blocked.
manualTasks.result: Trigger moves toward awaiting information or advisor review while staying internal-only.
manualTasks.evidence: J01 request-data and route actions use the typed advisor-review boundary; typed recommendation-review command APIs define the canonical product path and carry audit expectations.
manualTasks.status: typed advisor-review boundary for J01 request-data and routing; full signal governance is not yet implemented.

manualTasks.title: Review an advisor approval package
manualTasks.outcome: Advisor approves, revises, requests more data, or escalates without releasing to the client.
manualTasks.result: Advisor decision is recorded or routed; compliance release remains required.
manualTasks.evidence: Advisor approval should audit; J01 escalation is on the typed advisor-review boundary, while typed recommendation-review commands are the canonical product path.
manualTasks.status: typed advisor-review/recommendation-review boundaries for J01 advisor actions; advisor approval is internal and not client visibility.

manualTasks.title: Release, block, or request evidence for advice-like content
manualTasks.outcome: Compliance determines whether content can become client-visible, stays blocked, or needs more evidence.
manualTasks.result: Release, block, or evidence-request state is visible; no unapproved advice reaches the client.
manualTasks.evidence: Compliance release/block must create audit; evidence completeness is required for release.
manualTasks.status: E3/E4 mixed demo states; broad release transaction is still a top implementation gap.

manualTasks.title: Review and submit a released client decision
manualTasks.outcome: Client reviews only released content, chooses accept/defer/reject, and receives proof of submission.
manualTasks.result: Decision success page and linked evidence record show the completion proof.
manualTasks.evidence: Decision event and evidence package should be immutable/audited.
manualTasks.status: E3 navigable UI with demo workflow actions; final decision/evidence package persistence remains incomplete.

manualTasks.title: Review evidence and create a controlled export
manualTasks.outcome: Evidence is inspected and exported only through scoped, redacted, approved, audited export steps.
manualTasks.result: Export package is previewed/downloaded only if scope, redaction, permission, and approval allow it.
manualTasks.status: E3 visual/navigable; export package/file/share realism is a Phase 18 gap.

manualTasks.title: Manage governance users, roles, and access requests
manualTasks.outcome: Sensitive user/role/access changes require scoped roles, confirmation, and audit history.
manualTasks.result: Access request is approved/denied/escalated and audit history shows lineage.
manualTasks.evidence: Sensitive role/access actions require second confirmation and audit.
manualTasks.status: E3/E4 demo actions visible; governed role/access transactions remain incomplete.

manualTasks.title: Choose a communication or escalation path
manualTasks.outcome: The right secure message, data request, call, workshop, external specialist, or compliance escalation path is selected.
manualTasks.result: Communication path or call-trigger state is visible and linked to evidence when material.
manualTasks.evidence: Sensitive communication should audit and evidence-link; advice-like messages require release controls.
manualTasks.status: E2/E3 mostly static communication surfaces; message/call persistence not claimed.

manualTasks.title: Monitor operations, SLA, and reference state
manualTasks.outcome: Ops reviews queues, SLA risk, service blueprint, roadmap, and state catalogue for delivery/control monitoring.
manualTasks.result: Bottlenecks, SLA breaches, roadmap scope, and state language are visible for internal use.
manualTasks.evidence: Ops mutations should audit if implemented; reference pages are internal only.
manualTasks.status: E2/E3 reference and dashboard surfaces; queue/SLA mutation not yet implemented.

fields.userMeaning: Classify information, workflow, guidance, advice-relevant, or advice
fields.validation: Cannot weaken release rule without reason

fields.userMeaning: Create tenant identity and regulatory context
fields.validation: Required and unique enough for demo
All required boxes must be selected

fields.exampleDemoValue: Morgan Family Office / Family Office Advisory
fields.validation: No final advice fields; required basics

fields.userMeaning: Define family role and decision scope
fields.allowedValues: Principal, CFO, Trustee, Beneficiary, Next Gen
Allowed file types and document taxonomy
fields.validation: Unsupported file or missing scope blocks upload

fields.userMeaning: Confirm or correct AI draft data
Approve, revise, request data, or escalate
fields.allowedValues: Approve, Revise, Request More Data, Escalate
fields.validation: Approval does not release to client

fields.userMeaning: Accept, defer, reject, or request more information
Choose secure message or escalation path

referenceTerms.meaning: A non-production role and tenant context used before real authentication.
Advice-like content cannot reach clients until advisor approval, compliance release, evidence, and permission checks pass.
Human advisor review stage that still stays internal.
Final compliance control for client visibility.
referenceTerms.allows: Allows released content if all gates pass

referenceTerms.meaning: Proof package for important actions, decisions, and releases.
Append-only proof that a sensitive action occurred or was denied.
Removal or masking of sensitive fields before export/share.
Extra confirmation for sensitive role, policy, manage, revoke, assign, or release actions.
User can see a blocked/restricted explanation instead of inaccessible data.
Internal documentation/product page, not a client workflow.

branches.whatUserSees: The user sees the Platform Settings task context and follows the expected UI sequence.
branches.whatUserCanDo: Review, select, enter, or confirm permitted data.
branches.whatUserCannotDo: Bypass required gates or tenant/role scope.
branches.requiredNextStep: Policy baseline is reviewed; sensitive changes require confirmation and audit.

branches.whatUserSees: The UI shows a blocked/restricted/missing-evidence state.
branches.whatUserCanDo: Review the reason, request evidence, change role, or return to the correct prior step.
branches.whatUserCannotDo: Force completion or claim persistence when the app only shows a static/demo state.
branches.requiredNextStep: Resolve the missing role, evidence, compliance, or data requirement.

implementationStatus.status: E3 navigable UI with visible policy states; broad persisted policy transactions are not claimed.
E3 navigable UI; tenant write workflow is a required input-mask slice, not yet fully governed.
E2/E3 visual and navigable onboarding surfaces; no real authentication claim.
E3 navigable UI with static/demo data; profile persistence is a P0/P1 implementation need.
E3 navigable UI; entity/action mutations and evidence gate need transaction wiring.
E3 navigable UI; no real file storage/extraction transaction is claimed.
typed advisor-review boundary for J01 request-data and routing; full signal governance is not yet implemented.
typed advisor-review/recommendation-review boundaries for J01 advisor actions; advisor approval is internal and not client visibility.
E3/E4 mixed demo states; broad release transaction is still a top implementation gap.
E3 navigable UI with demo workflow actions; final decision/evidence package persistence remains incomplete.
E3 visual/navigable; export package/file/share realism is a Phase 18 gap.
E3/E4 demo actions visible; governed role/access transactions remain incomplete.
E2/E3 mostly static communication surfaces; message/call persistence not claimed.
E2/E3 reference and dashboard surfaces; queue/SLA mutation not yet implemented.

gaps: Most non-J01 workflows are not fully persisted/governed
Compliance release transaction needs full domain wiring
Live screenshots still need capture pass
